column1: # Qualities & description — physical/sensory qualities and general descriptors.
# Belongs here: sensory/physical qualities (綺麗, 清潔, 滑らか, 静か, 新鮮),
# and broad descriptors that don't fit another theme (変, 様々, 別, 急, 主).
# This is the catch-all; prefer a more specific theme when one fits.

column5: [不: not/un- | 思: think | 議: deliberate/discuss]
